Package com.blackaby.Backend.Helpers

Class GUIActions

java.lang.Object
com.blackaby.Backend.Helpers.GUIActions
All Implemented Interfaces:
ActionListener, EventListener
public final class GUIActions extends Object implements ActionListener
Dispatches host UI actions from menus and buttons.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    GUIActions.Action
    Actions available in the host UI.

    Creates an action dispatcher for one UI action.

  • Constructor Details

    • GUIActions

      public GUIActions(MainWindow mainWindow, GUIActions.Action action, DuckEmulation attachedEmulation)
      Creates an action dispatcher for one UI action.
      Parameters:
      mainWindow - owning main window
      action - action to dispatch
      attachedEmulation - emulator instance to control

    • GUIActions

      public GUIActions(MainWindow mainWindow, GUIActions.Action action, DuckEmulation attachedEmulation, Integer stateSlot)
      Creates an action dispatcher for a state-slot menu item.
      Parameters:
      mainWindow - owning main window
      action - save or load action
      attachedEmulation - emulator instance to control
      stateSlot - save-state slot from 0 to 9

  • Method Details

    • actionPerformed

      public void actionPerformed(ActionEvent event)
      Specified by:
      actionPerformed in interface ActionListener
